entities.name: SOIL DEHYDROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: A key indicator of microbial oxidative processes and soil health, measured by the TTC method

entities.name: MICROBIAL OXIDATIVE PROCESSES
entities.description: Biological processes involving oxidation by microbes in the soil

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The overall state of soil biological functioning and quality

entities.name: TTC METHOD
entities.description: A method for measuring soil dehydrogenase activity involving the reduction of triphenyl tetrazolium chloride

entities.name: TRIPHENYL TETRAZOLIUM CHLORIDE
entities.description: A chemical reagent used in the TTC method that is reduced to triphenyl formazan

entities.name: TRIPHENYL FORMAZAN
entities.description: The product formed when triphenyl tetrazolium chloride is reduced

entities.name: SPECTROPHOTOMETRY
entities.description: The technique used to quantify the amount of triphenyl formazan produced

entities.name: MICROBIAL OXIDATIVE METABOLISM
entities.description: The metabolic processes of soil microbes involving oxidation

entities.name: SOIL BIOLOGICAL FUNCTIONING
entities.description: The collective biological activities and processes occurring within the soil
